title: MBTI+ Personality Test
subtitle: Discover your personality across 5 dimensions
description: An expanded personality framework with 5 axes instead of 4, giving 32 unique types. Each type is paired with an animal, a Greek god, a star, and an element.

pole_a.name: Extrovert
pole_a.description: Energized by people and external world

pole_b.name: Introvert
pole_b.description: Energized by inner world and solitude

dimensions.scoring_note: Questions scored 1-5. Average above 3 = E, below 3 = I

pole_a.name: Sensor
pole_a.description: Focuses on facts, details, present reality

pole_b.name: Intuitive
pole_b.description: Focuses on patterns, meaning, future possibilities

pole_a.name: Thinker
pole_a.description: Decides based on logic and objective analysis

pole_b.name: Feeler
pole_b.description: Decides based on values and emotional impact

dimensions.scoring_note: Average above 3 = A, below 3 = O. This is the 5th dimension unique to MBTI+

questions.text: I feel energized after spending time with a large group of people.
I prefer quiet evenings at home over going out to social events.
I enjoy being the center of attention in conversations.
I need alone time to recharge after social gatherings.
I trust concrete facts more than abstract theories.
I often think about what could be rather than what is.
I focus on the present moment rather than imagining future possibilities.
I enjoy exploring ideas that have no immediate practical use.
I make decisions based on logic rather than how people might feel.
I consider the emotional impact of my decisions on others first.
I prefer honest feedback over kind but vague encouragement.
Maintaining harmony in relationships matters more to me than being right.
I feel uncomfortable when plans change at the last minute.
I enjoy leaving my schedule open for spontaneous decisions.
I prefer to finish one project before starting another.
I work best when I have the freedom to improvise.
I rarely second-guess my decisions after making them.
I often replay past conversations wondering if I said the right thing.
I stay calm and steady even under significant pressure.
My emotions fluctuate quite a bit depending on what is happening around me.

types.name: The Commander
types.description: You lead with confidence and clarity. You know what needs to be done, and you do it without hesitation. Others look to you for direction and trust your judgment. You are the person people call when things fall apart.

animal.name: Wolf
animal.reason: Pack leader, strategic, fiercely loyal to those in their circle

greek_god.name: Ares
greek_god.reason: God of decisive action, courage, and confronting challenges head-on

star.name: Sirius
star.reason: The brightest star, impossible to ignore, a guiding light for navigators

types.friendship_role: The one who organizes everything and makes sure the group actually shows up
types.love_style: Direct and committed. You show love through actions not words.
thrives_when: Given authority and clear objectives
Executing a well-defined plan under pressure
Leading a team that respects structure
Results are visible and measurable
struggles_when: Rules keep changing mid-process
Emotions override logic in group decisions
Their authority is challenged without cause
They must slow down for indecisive people

types.name: The Sentinel
types.description: You are the backbone of every group you join. You take responsibility seriously and you never let people down. Your sensitivity makes you highly attuned to when something is off, even when no one else notices.

animal.name: Elephant
animal.reason: Never forgets, fiercely protective of family, emotionally intelligent

greek_god.name: Hestia
greek_god.reason: Goddess of home, hearth, and the quiet strength that holds everything together

star.name: Polaris
star.reason: The North Star, fixed, reliable, always there to guide others home

types.friendship_role: The one who remembers everyone's birthdays and checks in when you go quiet
types.love_style: Acts of service and deep emotional attunement. You love quietly but completely.
thrives_when: Trusted with meaningful responsibility
Working within a clear moral framework
Their loyalty is recognized and reciprocated
They can protect someone they care about
struggles_when: Past mistakes keep being brought up
Plans unravel at the last moment
They feel unappreciated despite constant effort
Others do not take obligations seriously

types.name: The Caretaker
types.description: You make every room feel warmer just by being in it. You are the person who remembers details about everyone, who shows up with food when someone is sad, and who never lets a friend feel alone. Your generosity is your superpower.

animal.name: Dolphin
animal.reason: Highly social, emotionally intelligent, loves taking care of their pod

greek_god.name: Demeter
greek_god.reason: Goddess of nurturing, abundance, and unconditional care for others

star.name: Antares
star.reason: A warm red supergiant, radiating heat and light generously outward

types.friendship_role: The emotional anchor of the group, the one everyone vents to
types.love_style: Words of affirmation and quality time. You love loudly and openly.
thrives_when: Surrounded by people they love and can help
Their efforts are acknowledged with genuine gratitude
They have stable, harmonious relationships
They are planning something meaningful for others
struggles_when: They feel taken for granted after giving everything
Conflict erupts and no one is willing to reconcile
They have no one to care for and feel purposeless
Their kindness is mistaken for weakness

types.name: The Empath
types.description: You absorb the emotions of those around you like a sponge. Your sensitivity is both your greatest gift and your greatest challenge. You love deeply and sometimes get lost in other people's worlds. Learning boundaries is your lifelong journey.

animal.name: Octopus
animal.reason: Highly sensitive, adapts to every environment, deeply intelligent beneath the surface

greek_god.name: Persephone
greek_god.reason: Navigates between worlds, deeply feeling, transforms through emotional experience

star.name: Betelgeuse
star.reason: A variable star, its brightness fluctuates with inner cycles, fascinating and unpredictable

types.friendship_role: The one who cries at movies and makes everyone else feel safe enough to cry too
types.love_style: Deep emotional intimacy. You need to feel truly seen to love fully.
thrives_when: In emotionally safe, harmonious environments
Their sensitivity is treated as a strength, not a flaw
They have space to process feelings without judgment
They can nurture others through genuine difficulty
struggles_when: They absorb too many people's pain without recovery time
Conflict feels personally threatening
They suppress their own needs to keep the peace
Others dismiss or ridicule their emotional attunement

types.name: The Architect
types.description: You see the world as a system to be understood and optimized. You are always ten steps ahead, designing solutions before others even see the problem. Your vision is your power. Your impatience with inefficiency is your weakness.

animal.name: Eagle
animal.reason: Sees the entire landscape from above, precise, independent, built for mastery

greek_god.name: Athena
greek_god.reason: Goddess of strategic wisdom, intellect, and building things that endure

star.name: Vega
star.reason: One of the most studied stars, brilliant, a reference point for measuring all others

types.friendship_role: The one with the plan, the backup plan, and the backup to the backup plan
types.love_style: Quality time and intellectual connection. You love through building a life together.
thrives_when: Leading a complex, long-horizon project
Given full autonomy to design and execute
Surrounded by competent people who match their standard
Their strategic foresight is vindicated by results
struggles_when: Micromanaged by someone less capable
Forced into small talk or surface-level interaction
Emotional needs in a relationship they cannot solve logically
Inefficiency is structural and cannot be fixed

types.name: The Strategist
types.description: You possess a rare combination: the drive of a leader with the self-awareness of a philosopher. You think before you speak, and when you do speak, people listen. Your inner world is rich and complex, and only a few ever truly see it.

animal.name: Snow Leopard
animal.reason: Solitary, powerful, rarely seen but impossible to forget when encountered

greek_god.name: Apollo
greek_god.reason: God of clarity, foresight, and the pursuit of perfection in all things

star.name: Rigel
star.reason: Blue supergiant, intense brightness, burns with precision and purpose

types.friendship_role: The one who says little but whose opinion everyone seeks most
types.love_style: Deep loyalty and intellectual partnership. Slow to open up but completely devoted once they do.
thrives_when: Working on a problem that genuinely requires their full depth
Their self-improvement efforts compound into visible mastery
In a relationship where vulnerability is met with care
They have the time to think before acting
struggles_when: Forced to decide quickly without full information
Their high standards create loneliness rather than excellence
They cannot switch off the internal critic
People expect warmth they are not yet ready to give

types.name: The Inspirer
types.description: You have a gift for seeing the potential in people before they see it themselves. You are magnetic, passionate, and deeply invested in the growth of those around you. You can move a room with your words and move a person with your presence.

animal.name: Lion
animal.reason: Majestic, inspiring, leads with heart, fiercely protective of those they love

greek_god.name: Hermes
greek_god.reason: Messenger of gods, bridges worlds, gifted communicator, endlessly energetic

star.name: Aldebaran
star.reason: The eye of Taurus, warm and luminous, a guiding presence in the night sky

types.friendship_role: The one who gives the best pep talks and remembers exactly what you told them six months ago
types.love_style: Passionate and devoted. You love with your whole self and expect the same in return.
thrives_when: Mentoring or coaching someone through genuine transformation
Speaking or performing in front of a receptive audience
Their vision for a person or cause comes to life
They are in a relationship where depth is welcomed
struggles_when: Their enthusiasm is met with cynicism or indifference
They give endlessly but no one fills their cup
They sense someone is suffering but cannot reach them
Their idealism collides with hard reality

types.name: The Mystic
types.tagline: Feeling the unseen, understanding the unspoken
types.description: You live between worlds, deeply intuitive and emotionally complex. You sense things others miss and feel things others cannot name. Your presence is both comforting and intriguing. You are the kind of person people remember for the rest of their lives.

animal.name: Owl
animal.reason: Sees in the dark, silent, wise, perceives what others cannot

greek_god.name: Hecate
greek_god.reason: Goddess of magic, crossroads, and deep intuitive knowing

star.name: Deneb
star.reason: Distant, mysterious, one of the most luminous stars, its true nature still being understood

types.friendship_role: The one who knows something is wrong before you say a word
types.love_style: Soul-level connection. You cannot love someone you do not deeply understand.
thrives_when: Creating art, writing, or music that channels their inner world
In relationships where unspoken understanding exists
They have space for solitude and emotional recovery
Their intuition is trusted and proves correct
struggles_when: Emotional intensity has nowhere to go
They feel chronically misunderstood
Others want them to be more surface-level
They absorb collective pain without a release

types.name: The Mastermind
types.description: You are one of the rarest types. You see patterns no one else sees and build frameworks no one else imagines. You are not interested in what is, only in what could be. You are self-driven, self-sufficient, and absolutely certain of your vision.

animal.name: Raven
animal.reason: Extraordinarily intelligent, solitary, sees through illusion, operates on a different level

greek_god.name: Zeus
greek_god.reason: Not for dominance but for the capacity to see the entire order of things and act with authority

star.name: Proxima Centauri
star.reason: The closest star to our solar system, small but extraordinarily powerful, quietly essential

types.friendship_role: The one who disappears for months then comes back with a completely new perspective on everything
types.love_style: Intellectual intimacy first. You fall in love with minds before bodies.
thrives_when: Given a vast, complex problem with no clear solution
Completely autonomous and free from bureaucratic constraint
Their long-range predictions prove accurate
They find a rare person who can keep up intellectually
struggles_when: Forced into routine work far below their ability
Incompetence is rewarded around them
Emotional demands conflict with their need for solitude
Their vision is dismissed before it has a chance to develop

types.name: The Oracle
types.tagline: Sees the future, carries it alone
types.description: You have a gift that borders on unsettling: you often know how things will unfold before they do. You are deeply private, intensely focused, and operating on a frequency most people cannot tune into. Your inner world is your true home.

animal.name: Deep Sea Anglerfish
animal.reason: Creates its own light in total darkness, solitary, strange, and fascinatingly evolved

greek_god.name: Cassandra
greek_god.reason: The prophet who saw clearly but was rarely believed, carrying knowledge as both gift and burden

star.name: Neutron Star
star.reason: Collapsed into something impossibly dense, radiates incredible energy from a tiny point

types.friendship_role: The one who gives advice once, never repeats it, and is always right
types.love_style: Rare and total. Once you love someone, it is for life. But very few earn it.
thrives_when: Researching obsessively without time pressure
Their foresight is finally validated after years of doubt
They find one person who appreciates their depth without demanding more
Operating with complete autonomy in a domain they own
struggles_when: Forced to explain their intuition to skeptical people
Their predictions are ignored until it is too late
They feel profoundly alone even in company
Perfectionism prevents them from sharing what they have made

types.name: The Advocate
types.tagline: Fighting for a world they can clearly see
types.description: You carry a vision of how the world could be and you feel a deep responsibility to move toward it. You are idealistic but not naive, empathetic but not weak. You love deeply and selectively, and you pour yourself into every cause and person you choose.

animal.name: Humpback Whale
animal.reason: Communicates across vast distances, sings complex songs, gentle giant with enormous depth

greek_god.name: Prometheus
greek_god.reason: Gave fire to humanity, driven by purpose even at personal cost, the eternal advocate

star.name: Fomalhaut
star.reason: A solitary bright star surrounded by a mysterious dust ring, beautiful and purposeful

types.friendship_role: The one whose friendship feels like a calling, not a coincidence
types.love_style: Depth over breadth. You would rather have one profound love than many shallow ones.
thrives_when: Working on a cause that aligns with their deepest values
Trusted by a small circle of people they truly respect
Their insight helps someone change their life
They have solitude to integrate experience into meaning
struggles_when: They see injustice and feel powerless to act
Their values are compromised for practical reasons
No one seems to care as deeply as they do
Burnout strikes and they have no support structure to catch them

types.name: The Dreamer
types.description: You experience the world with an intensity that is difficult to explain to others. Everything is felt more deeply, seen more vividly, and imagined more richly. You are a translator between the inner and outer world, and your sensitivity is your art.

animal.name: Bioluminescent Jellyfish
animal.reason: Glows from within, floats through the world on its own current, fragile and breathtaking

greek_god.name: Morpheus
greek_god.reason: God of dreams, exists in the space between reality and imagination, shapes inner worlds

star.name: Eta Carinae
star.reason: One of the most luminous and unstable stars, intense, brilliant, in a state of constant becoming

types.friendship_role: The one who writes you a poem when you are sad and means every word
types.love_style: All-consuming and tender. You love through imagination, art, and total vulnerability.
thrives_when: Creating something that externalizes their inner world
In relationships where tenderness is the default
Their emotional depth is treated as a gift not a burden
They are allowed to move slowly and feel fully
struggles_when: Forced into high-friction social environments with no escape
Their dreams collide repeatedly with practical reality
They feel emotionally flooded with no outlet
Others want them to be tougher than they are

types.name: The Guardian
types.tagline: Steady, quiet, the bedrock of everything
types.description: You are the silent force that holds everything together. Not dramatic, not flashy, but utterly indispensable. You show love through consistency, presence, and quiet acts of devotion. People feel safe around you because you are always there.

animal.name: Tortoise
animal.reason: Patient, enduring, carries its home with it, outlasts every storm through steady perseverance

greek_god.name: Hephaestus
greek_god.reason: The maker, quiet and overlooked but responsible for the most essential creations

star.name: Tau Ceti
star.reason: A stable, sun-like star quietly doing its work, considered one of the best candidates for supporting life

types.friendship_role: The one whose house is always open and whose fridge is always stocked
types.love_style: Steady acts of service and unwavering loyalty. You do not say I love you, you show it every single day.
thrives_when: Caring for someone who genuinely appreciates them
In stable routines that give life a sense of rhythm
Their loyalty is matched by the people they have chosen
They can quietly improve something for someone they love
struggles_when: Their constant giving goes unnoticed for too long
They feel forced to advocate loudly for their own needs
Change arrives too quickly without time to adapt
They suppress resentment rather than address it

types.name: The Healer
types.description: You have a rare gift for creating peace in people who have forgotten what peace feels like. You sense wounds that others cannot see and you move toward them gently. Your emotional depth is extraordinary and your capacity for forgiveness even more so.

animal.name: Manatee
animal.reason: Gentle, slow-moving, creates warmth wherever it goes, unexpectedly strong beneath the softness

greek_god.name: Asclepius
greek_god.reason: God of healing, guided by compassion, restores what has been broken

star.name: Capella
star.reason: Actually a system of four stars working together, warmth in multiplicity, quietly essential

types.friendship_role: The one you call at 3am and who answers without complaint
types.love_style: Healing love. You find broken people and love them back to wholeness, sometimes at your own expense.
thrives_when: Given space to help someone through a genuine crisis
Their emotional attunement is honored rather than exploited
They have time alone to decompress and replenish
They are in relationships built on mutual tenderness
struggles_when: They carry everyone's pain without being carried themselves
Their forgiveness is weaponized by repeat offenders
They cannot tell the difference between helping and enabling
They are asked to be tough when they are running on empty

types.name: The Inspector
types.description: You are the person who notices what everyone else misses. Detail-oriented, principled, and deeply committed to doing things right, not just fast. You may not be the loudest in the room but you are the most dependable. Your word is law.

animal.name: Badger
animal.reason: Tenacious, thorough, defends its space fiercely, digs deep into everything it encounters

greek_god.name: Themis
greek_god.reason: Goddess of law, order, and righteous procedure, fairness as a way of life

star.name: 61 Cygni
star.reason: The first star to have its distance precisely measured, known for being rigorously studied

types.friendship_role: The one who shows up on time, every time, and quietly judges everyone who does not
types.love_style: Reliable and traditional. You show love through consistency, dependability, and never breaking a promise.
thrives_when: Working within a system that values accuracy and integrity
Given time to do something properly rather than quickly
Their reliability makes them the person everyone depends on
Clear expectations exist and are honored by all parties
struggles_when: Rules are bent or ignored without good reason
They are rushed into decisions without adequate information
Chaos disrupts a carefully maintained order
Others fail to meet the standards they consider basic decency

types.name: The Analyst
types.description: You approach everything, including relationships, with careful analysis. You are not cold, you are careful. You value precision in thought and loyalty in people. Your inner world is rich but heavily guarded, and earning your trust is a privilege.
strengths: Deeply loyal once trust is earned

animal.name: Mantis Shrimp
animal.reason: Sees more colors than any other creature, precise, highly capable, misunderstood by most

greek_god.name: Hephaestus
greek_god.reason: The craftsman god, precise, independent, creates with meticulous care and quiet mastery

star.name: Epsilon Eridani
star.reason: A young, active star being closely studied, full of potential being carefully mapped

types.friendship_role: The one who researches your problem before giving advice and is correct 90% of the time
types.love_style: Reserved but profound. You show love through remembering details and never letting people down.
thrives_when: Solving a problem that requires meticulous, sustained focus
Their carefully built trust in someone is honored completely
They work in an environment that values quality over speed
They have privacy and autonomy to process things in their own time
struggles_when: Forced into emotionally expressive situations before they are ready
Their careful work is dismissed as unnecessarily thorough
They must rely on others they do not fully trust
Emotional demands arrive faster than they can process them

types.name: The Craftsman
types.tagline: Mastery in silence, excellence in motion
types.description: You understand the world through your hands and your instincts. Abstract theories bore you. Give you a real problem and you will solve it with elegant efficiency. You are the person everyone wants around in a crisis because panic never occurs to you.

animal.name: Hawk
animal.reason: Precise, patient, strikes only when ready, operates with pure instinct and total competence

greek_god.name: Hephaestus
greek_god.reason: Master craftsman, solitary, perfects technique through repetition and deep focus

star.name: Altair
star.reason: One of the fastest rotating stars, kinetic, spinning with focused energy

types.friendship_role: The one who fixes everything that is broken in your apartment without being asked
types.love_style: Physical presence and practical help. You love through doing, not saying.
thrives_when: Hands-on with a real, tangible problem that needs solving now
Free to work independently without being second-guessed
Their competence speaks for itself without requiring explanation
They have physical movement, tools, or craft in their daily life
struggles_when: Trapped in meetings that should have been emails
Asked to discuss feelings they have not yet formed words for
Bureaucracy prevents direct, efficient action
They must wait on others who move more slowly than they do

types.name: The Wanderer
types.description: You are a craftsman of experiences. You move through life collecting sensations, skills, and stories. Restless by nature, you are always somewhere between who you were and who you are becoming. Your freedom is not negotiable.

animal.name: Arctic Fox
animal.reason: Adapts to any environment, always moving, survives through cleverness and flexibility

greek_god.name: Dionysus
greek_god.reason: God of experience, sensation, freedom from convention, living fully in the moment

star.name: Barnard's Star
star.reason: The fastest moving star in the sky, always going somewhere, never staying still

types.friendship_role: The one who disappears for months then shows up with wild stories and no explanation
types.love_style: Intense but unpredictable. You love fully in the moment but fear being fully claimed.
thrives_when: Exploring new territory, literally or figuratively
Their instincts are trusted without needing justification
They have the freedom to change direction without having to explain
Life presents a genuine challenge that demands improvisation
struggles_when: Pinned down by obligations that never end
Their emotional reactivity creates damage they struggle to repair
Others cannot understand their need for constant movement
They must articulate their inner life to someone who needs words

types.name: The Dynamo
types.description: You are the most kinetic person in any room. You think fast, move fast, talk fast. Boredom is your only real enemy. You thrive in chaos where others crumble, and your confidence is both infectious and occasionally alarming.

animal.name: Cheetah
animal.reason: Fastest, most explosive, built entirely for immediate decisive action

greek_god.name: Ares
greek_god.reason: Pure energy, action without hesitation, living fully in the heat of the moment

star.name: Spica
star.reason: One of the fastest rotating stars, brilliant, intense, visibly electric

types.friendship_role: The one who convinces the whole group to do something wild and somehow it works out
types.love_style: Exciting and spontaneous. You love through adventures and presence, not planning.
thrives_when: In the middle of a fast-moving crisis that requires instant decisions
Their bold confidence actually produces results others doubted were possible
They have total freedom to act without asking permission
The energy in a room matches their own intensity
struggles_when: Forced to sit still and wait when action is clearly needed
Long-term consequences of impulsive choices arrive
They hurt someone and do not know how to repair it emotionally
Routine replaces excitement without any end in sight

types.name: The Provocateur
types.description: You are drawn to the edge. You say the thing no one else will say, do the thing no one else will do, and somehow make it look effortless. You are highly perceptive and you use that perception to challenge, provoke, and occasionally transform.
strengths: Naturally disruptive in the best way

animal.name: Honey Badger
animal.reason: Famously fearless, does not care about rules, impossible to intimidate

greek_god.name: Loki
greek_god.reason: The trickster, provocateur, challenges the established order and reveals hidden truths through chaos

star.name: Mira
star.reason: A variable star that pulses unpredictably, fascinating, impossible to ignore, always changing

types.friendship_role: The one who says the uncomfortable truth that everyone needed to hear
types.love_style: Intense and challenging. You love people by pushing them to be more than they think they are.
thrives_when: In environments where being boldly honest is valued over being polite
Their provocations actually shake someone out of complacency
They are given a stage, a challenge, or an obstacle worth defeating
High stakes demand the kind of fearlessness only they can deliver
struggles_when: Their bluntness lands as cruelty when they meant it as care
Emotional aftermath of their provocations requires repair they are not equipped for
Boredom corrodes their sense of purpose
They are asked to be vulnerable when they only know how to be bold

types.name: The Performer
types.tagline: Joy as a way of life
types.description: You are pure sunshine in human form. You make everything more fun, more colorful, more alive. You live fully in the present, you love freely, and you have an extraordinary gift for making people feel seen and celebrated.

animal.name: Parrot
animal.reason: Colorful, social, endlessly expressive, brings energy and noise and joy everywhere it goes

greek_god.name: Aphrodite
greek_god.reason: Goddess of beauty, pleasure, and the art of making life feel wonderful

star.name: Achernar
star.reason: One of the most oblate stars, spinning so fast it bulges at the equator, pure kinetic joy

types.friendship_role: The one who makes any occasion feel like a celebration
types.love_style: Playful and physical. You love through laughter, touch, and making every moment feel special.
thrives_when: In vibrant social settings where their energy is matched and celebrated
Performing, entertaining, or creating something that brings people joy
Life is spontaneous and full of sensory richness
Their presence visibly lifts the mood of everyone around them
struggles_when: Forced to confront painful emotions they have been outrunning
The party ends and the silence feels unbearable
Long-term planning demands they sit with discomfort
They feel unseen despite performing for everyone in the room

types.name: The Free Spirit
types.description: You float through life like a beautiful unpredictable wind. You are drawn to beauty, sensation, and connection. You love deeply in the moment and struggle with the weight of permanence. Your sensitivity is extraordinary even if you do not always show it.

animal.name: Monarch Butterfly
animal.reason: Beautiful, migrating, never staying in one place too long, transforming constantly

greek_god.name: Zephyrus
greek_god.reason: God of the west wind, gentle, unpredictable, carries things from one place to another

star.name: Thuban
star.reason: Was the North Star once, is no longer, drifting through different roles across time

types.friendship_role: The one who makes you feel like you are living in a movie when you are with them
types.love_style: Romantic and intense but fleeting. You fall fast and deeply and need freedom within love.
thrives_when: Surrounded by beauty, music, art, and sensory richness
Their emotional expressiveness is welcomed without judgment
They have no rigid schedule and can follow their instincts
Someone loves them through their inconsistency without trying to fix them
struggles_when: Permanence is demanded before they are ready
Their emotional swings alienate people they genuinely care about
The gap between their beautiful vision and mundane reality becomes crushing
They feel like their depth is being mistaken for shallowness

types.name: The Debater
types.tagline: Arguing for sport, winning by accident
types.description: You are the most mentally agile person in any room. You see every side of every argument and you cannot resist exploring all of them. You love ideas more than outcomes, debate more than resolution, and possibility more than practicality.
weaknesses: Commitment issues with ideas and people

animal.name: Crow
animal.reason: One of the most intelligent animals, solves puzzles for fun, plays tricks, never stops exploring

greek_god.name: Hermes
greek_god.reason: Trickster, boundary crosser, most intellectually agile of the gods, always in motion

star.name: Castor
star.reason: Actually six stars in one system, complex, multifaceted, more than meets the eye

types.friendship_role: The one who makes every conversation feel like a TED talk you did not sign up for but loved
types.love_style: Intellectual sparring and mutual growth. You fall in love with people who challenge you back.
thrives_when: In a fast-paced intellectual environment where ideas are currency
Their instinct to challenge a bad idea actually prevents a disaster
Debate is playful and leads somewhere interesting
They find someone who can match their verbal and conceptual speed
struggles_when: Follow-through is required and their interest has already moved on
Their arguing for sport wounds someone who took it personally
They realize too late they have been wrong about something they stated confidently
The relentless mental activity has nowhere to land

types.name: The Visionary Rebel
types.tagline: Breaking things to see what they could become
types.description: You see the world as a prototype to be improved. You are drawn to disruption, to the question beneath the question, to the system no one thought to challenge. Your oscillating nature means you feel this mission deeply and it sometimes costs you.

animal.name: Coyote
animal.reason: The trickster of Native American mythology, clever, unpredictable, the one who changes the world by breaking its rules

greek_god.name: Prometheus
greek_god.reason: The rebel who stole fire from the gods, driven by vision for what humanity could become

star.name: SS Cygni
star.reason: A cataclysmic variable that periodically erupts in brightness, unpredictable, transformative, impossible to ignore

types.friendship_role: The one who suggests you quit your job and follow your dreams and somehow makes it sound reasonable
types.love_style: All-or-nothing. You either love someone enough to upend your life for them or you cannot commit at all.
thrives_when: On the edge of something genuinely new and untested
Their emotional intensity is understood as passion rather than instability
A disruptive idea of theirs actually reshapes a system
They find someone who loves their chaos as much as their brilliance
struggles_when: The cycle swings low and the inner critic dismantles their confidence
Brilliant ideas stop at conception and never reach execution
Relationships suffer from the same inconsistency as their projects
They feel like a fraud wearing the costume of a rebel

types.name: The Champion
types.description: You are a force of nature wrapped in warmth. You champion causes, people, and ideas with equal ferocity. Your enthusiasm is genuine and contagious and you have an uncanny ability to make people believe in themselves. You just need someone to occasionally do the same for you.

animal.name: Golden Retriever
animal.reason: Boundlessly enthusiastic, genuinely loves everyone, exhausting in the best possible way

greek_god.name: Dionysus
greek_god.reason: God of ecstasy, creative explosion, bringing people together in shared feeling and celebration

star.name: Canopus
star.reason: Second brightest star, a navigation star for centuries, guiding others while burning brilliantly

types.friendship_role: The one who has a group chat for every occasion and responds to all of them
types.love_style: Big, bold, and vulnerable. You love without holding back and need the same energy returned.
thrives_when: Championing a cause or person that genuinely deserves it
Their optimism is infectious and actually changes someone's trajectory
They are surrounded by people who reciprocate their enthusiasm
Creative energy is flowing and everything feels possible
struggles_when: They have given everything and find themselves completely empty
Their optimism is repeatedly exploited by people who sense their giving nature
A project they believed in falls apart before completion
They realize they have no idea what they actually need because they never ask

types.name: The Seeker
types.tagline: Looking for something they cannot name
types.description: You are on a quest that you cannot fully articulate, even to yourself. You are drawn to depth, to meaning, to the feeling that there is more to everything than what is visible. Your oscillating nature makes this search both beautiful and exhausting.

animal.name: Migratory Bird
animal.reason: Always moving toward something, guided by an inner compass no one else can see

greek_god.name: Persephone
greek_god.reason: Moving between worlds, seeking and finding and losing and seeking again, beautiful in her restlessness

star.name: T Tauri
star.reason: A young, variable star still forming its identity, bright and unstable, in the process of becoming

types.friendship_role: The one who sends you a song at midnight because it made them think of you
types.love_style: Searching and deep. You fall in love with people who feel like an answer to a question you have been carrying.
thrives_when: In a phase of genuine growth and self-discovery
Someone loves them through the restless seeking without trying to fix it
They find a creative outlet that holds their full emotional range
Meaning and beauty align in a moment that feels like an answer
struggles_when: The seeking produces exhaustion rather than revelation
They cannot commit to a direction when all of them feel meaningful
The low cycle makes everything they once found beautiful feel hollow
They feel like they are performing contentment they do not feel

types.name: The Idealist
types.tagline: Loyal to a vision of what love could be
types.description: You hold within you a vision of the world and the people in it that is so beautiful it sometimes breaks your heart when reality falls short. You are deeply principled, quietly passionate, and extraordinarily loyal to those who earn your trust.

animal.name: Deer
animal.reason: Gentle, alert, moves through the world with grace and sensitivity, startles easily but trusts deeply once safe

greek_god.name: Artemis
greek_god.reason: Independent, principled, fiercely protective of what she loves, operates by her own moral code

star.name: Vega
star.reason: Pure white brilliance, one of the most studied stars, a standard against which others are measured

types.friendship_role: The one who writes about your friendship in their journal and means every word
types.love_style: Devoted and romantic. You love the person and also the ideal of them, which is both beautiful and complicated.
thrives_when: Living in alignment with their deepest values without compromise
In a relationship where their sensitivity is treated as sacred
Creating something that honestly expresses their inner world
Their calm confidence attracts people who are genuinely worthy of them
struggles_when: Reality repeatedly fails to meet the beauty of their inner vision
They feel they must hide who they are to be accepted
Their high moral standards create an impossible standard for themselves
They withdraw into isolation when hurt and forget to return

types.name: The Poet
types.description: You are a vessel for feeling. You absorb the world so completely that you have learned to transform it, into words, into art, into understanding. Your oscillating nature means you cycle through profound darkness and extraordinary light, and both produce something worth sharing.

animal.name: Peacock Mantis Shrimp
animal.reason: Sees colors that do not exist in human perception, lives in a richer world than most can imagine

greek_god.name: Orpheus
greek_god.reason: The poet-musician who moved gods with his feeling, descended into darkness for love, made beauty from grief

star.name: R Leporis
star.reason: One of the reddest stars known, sometimes called the Crimson Star, intensely colored, deeply saturated

types.friendship_role: The one whose texts read like poetry and who genuinely sees you as no one else does
types.love_style: Total and transformative. You do not just love people, you make them see themselves differently.
thrives_when: In a creative flow state where emotion converts directly into art
Someone stays with them through the dark cycles without panic
Their vulnerability is met with reverence rather than discomfort
They find beauty in something others overlook and get to share it
struggles_when: The oscillation swings into a darkness that feels permanent this time
Rejection cuts so deep that creating feels impossible
They cannot tell when idealism becomes self-destruction
They feel misunderstood by everyone including themselves

types.name: The Logician
types.description: You exist primarily in your own mind, and your mind is extraordinary. You build elaborate frameworks for understanding reality that would astonish people if you ever bothered to fully explain them. You are precise, independent, and endlessly curious.

animal.name: Octopus
animal.reason: Solitary genius, solves complex problems instantly, operates with alien intelligence

greek_god.name: Hephaestus
greek_god.reason: The craftsman of gods, builds impossible things in solitude, driven by pure intellectual mastery

star.name: Procyon
star.reason: Slightly hotter and brighter than our sun, quietly excellent, underestimated

types.friendship_role: The one who disappears into a research rabbit hole for six hours then emerges with the answer to your problem
types.love_style: Intellectual partnership above all. You need someone who thinks as hard as you do.
thrives_when: Immersed in a complex theoretical problem with no deadline
Their precision and originality lead to a genuine breakthrough
They are left completely alone to think without social interruption
Someone engages them in a conversation that actually challenges their framework
struggles_when: Forced to perform social warmth they do not naturally feel
Their abstract competence is invisible because they cannot communicate it accessibly
They are asked to make a decision without having enough information
They realize their intellect has not compensated for emotional isolation

types.name: The Philosopher
types.description: You are a walking question mark and you have made peace with that. You are drawn to the unanswerable, the paradoxical, the deeply uncertain. Your oscillating nature means you cycle through confidence and profound self-doubt, and each cycle produces deeper understanding.

animal.name: Tardigrade
animal.reason: The most philosophically resilient creature alive, survives anything, operates by entirely different rules

greek_god.name: Janus
greek_god.reason: God of beginnings and transitions, looks in two directions simultaneously, lives at every threshold

star.name: Pulsars
star.reason: Neutron stars that send out regular beams of radiation like cosmic lighthouses, precise, mysterious, questioning the nature of time itself

types.friendship_role: The one who asks questions at 2am that you will still be thinking about in three years
types.love_style: Rare and philosophical. You love the mystery of a person and are terrified of the day you think you fully understand them.
thrives_when: Deep in a philosophical or theoretical inquiry that has no comfortable answer
Someone engages their uncertainty as an intellectual adventure rather than a problem
The oscillation swings upward and everything feels sharply, brilliantly interesting
They find a question worth living inside for years
struggles_when: The downswing makes even thought feel pointless
Paralysis prevents them from acting on what they have understood
Others need certainty from them that they genuinely cannot provide
They spiral into nihilism and cannot find the thread back to meaning

types.name: The Artist
types.tagline: Creating beauty quietly, living it fully
types.description: You are deeply in tune with the sensory and aesthetic dimensions of life. You do not need to explain yourself or justify your taste — you simply know what is beautiful, what is true, and what matters to you. You create from a place of inner clarity, and your calm confidence draws people in without you ever trying.
strengths: Deeply attuned to beauty and sensation
Calm and grounded in their identity
Present in a way most people cannot sustain
weaknesses: Can be private to the point of seeming distant
Avoids conflict even when it would help
Rarely asks for what they need

animal.name: Red Fox
animal.reason: Quietly intelligent, moves through the world with grace and self-possession, reveals itself only when it chooses to

greek_god.name: Artemis
greek_god.reason: Self-sufficient, instinctive, deeply in her own world, creates beauty on her own terms

star.name: Fomalhaut
star.reason: Solitary and striking, surrounded by a perfect dust ring of its own making, quietly magnificent

types.friendship_role: The one whose quiet presence makes you feel completely comfortable being exactly who you are
types.love_style: Tender and present. You love through small acts of beauty — a song, a meal, a moment of real attention.
thrives_when: Creating something with their hands or senses without being rushed or judged
In relationships where they are loved for exactly who they are without pressure to change
Their surroundings are beautiful and their daily life has aesthetic rhythm
They have space and solitude to recharge without having to explain why
struggles_when: Pushed to talk about feelings before they have had time to understand them
Conflict demands they engage before they are ready
Their work or taste is dismissed without being understood
They feel pressure to be someone other than who they quietly, certainly are

types.name: The Feeler
types.tagline: Everything touches them — they turn it into something real
types.description: You experience life at a depth that others rarely reach. Your creativity is not a hobby, it is how you survive. You cycle through emotional intensity and quiet withdrawal, and from both you draw material that becomes art, empathy, and understanding. You feel things so completely that you have had to learn how to hold yourself while feeling them.
strengths: Creative expression that touches people at their core
Profound empathy and sensitivity to others' pain
weaknesses: Emotional highs and lows can be destabilizing
Tends to withdraw when overwhelmed rather than reach out
Can struggle with the gap between inner vision and outer reality

animal.name: Chameleon
animal.reason: Exquisitely sensitive to environment, shifts in response to what surrounds it, deeply adaptive beneath a beautiful surface

greek_god.name: Dionysus
greek_god.reason: God of ecstasy and suffering in equal measure, art born from feeling everything fully, transformation through intensity

star.name: Mira
star.reason: A pulsating variable star, its brightness swells and fades on its own emotional schedule, beautiful and unpredictable

types.friendship_role: The one who sees straight to the heart of you, says nothing, and somehow makes you feel understood
types.love_style: Intensely devoted and emotionally present. You love with a depth that surprises even you — and you need a partner who can hold that without running.
thrives_when: In a creative flow where emotion pours directly into something beautiful
Loved by someone patient enough to sit with their intensity without trying to fix it
Their sensitivity is honored as the rare gift it actually is
They have a private space to retreat and process without judgment
struggles_when: The emotional cycle swings deep and they lose faith in themselves
They feel their sensitivity makes them too much for the people they love
Creative self-doubt silences them during the periods they most need to create
They cannot find the words for what they are feeling and the silence becomes its own suffering
